description_long: This object is a complete chess set featuring a square chessboard with a classic black-and-white checkered pattern, surrounded by a thick, dark border. The board is accompanied by a full set of chess pieces in contrasting black and white, some of which are positioned on the board while others are scattered nearby. Additional items include a black cup, a rectangular box, a chess instruction booklet, and a folded sheet, all arranged around the board. The chessboard itself appears to be made of a sturdy material, likely wood or plastic, with a smooth, matte finish. The border is wide and solid, providing a stable frame for the playing surface. The overall setup suggests a casual or instructional chess game, possibly in a park or urban recreational area.
description: A classic chess set with a black-and-white checkered board, bordered by a thick dark frame, and accompanied by chess pieces, a cup, a box, and instructional materials. The setup is visually organized and ready for play.
description_view_0: The chessboard is seen from a corner angle, showing both black and white pieces on the board and several pieces, a cup, and a box scattered around the board.
description_view_1: A frontal view of the chessboard with all pieces clearly visible, along with a cup, a box, and a chess booklet placed on either side.
description_view_2: The board is viewed from the opposite corner, highlighting the white pieces and showing the cup, booklet, and box more prominently in the foreground.
description_view_3: A rear view of the chessboard, with the black pieces facing forward and the cup, booklet, and box arranged behind the board.
attribute_board_pattern: The playing surface features a regular grid of alternating black and white squares, arranged in a classic checkered pattern with sharp, clean edges. The squares are perfectly aligned, forming a uniform grid with no decorative elements or embellishments within the playing area.
attribute_border_design: The border is a wide, solid band in a dark brown or black color, made of a material that appears to be wood or plastic. It is plain and unadorned, with no visible ornamentation, inscriptions, or markings, providing a sturdy and stable frame for the board.
